sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99030" key="sunago/reusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνᾰγόρ-ευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n99030.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">advocacy</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
